```{ojs}
metrics_data = FileAttachment("metrics.csv").csv({ typed: true })

unique_angle_step = [...new Set(metrics_data.map(d => d.angle_step))];
unique_servo_delay = [...new Set(metrics_data.map(d => d.servo_motor_delay))];

filtered_metrics_data = metrics_data.filter(function(row) {
    return (
        servo_delays.includes(row.servo_motor_delay)
        && angle_steps.includes(row.angle_step)
    );
})
```

```{ojs}
//| panel: input
viewof angle_steps = Inputs.checkbox(
    unique_angle_step,
    {
        value: unique_angle_step, 
        label: "Angle Step:"
    }
)
viewof servo_delays = Inputs.checkbox(
    unique_servo_delay,
    {
        value: unique_servo_delay, 
        label: "Servo Motor Delay:"
    }
)
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Plot

```{ojs}
import { Plot } from "@observablehq/plot";

{
    const plot = Plot.plot({
        width: 800,
        height: 600,
        marginLeft: 60,
        marginBottom: 50,
        style: {
            background: "transparent",
        },
        x: {
            label: "Mean Y-Intercept Error (mm)",
            grid: true,
            type: "log",
        },
        y: {
            label: "Mean Angle Error (deg)",
            grid: true,
            type: "log",
        },
        color: {
            type: "linear",
            scheme: "Cool",
            legend: true,
            label: "Total Time (s)",
        },
        marks: [
            Plot.dot(filtered_metrics_data, {
                x: "y_intercept_error",
                y: "angle_error_deg",
                fill: "total_time_s",
                r: 6,
                title: (d) =>
                    `Angle: ${d.angle_step.toFixed(2)}deg\nServo: ${d.servo_motor_delay.toFixed(2)}ms\nTotal Time: ${d.total_time_s.toFixed(2)}s`,
            }),
        ],
    });

    // Fix the white background on the legend ramp
    const ramp = plot.querySelector('svg[class*="-ramp"]');
    if (ramp) {
        const style = document.createElement("style");
        style.textContent = `
            svg[class*="-ramp"] {
                background: transparent !important;
            }
        `;
        plot.appendChild(style);
    }

    return plot;
}
```

## Data

```{ojs}
Inputs.table(filtered_metrics_data)
```

:::
